business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

positives: 31 years in business with 22 years of stable current management
Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
Written contracts with indemnification required from contractors
Clean loss history - 0 claims across prior 3 years (2022-2024)
concerns: Building is not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
LOC-007 (3250 Hill Avenue, Toledo - Manufacturing) is not sprinklered
No written contracts with all subcontractors
Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) not maintained despite manufacturing occupancies
Lockout/tagout procedures not in place despite manufacturing operations
Older buildings in portfolio (LOC-004 built 1992, LOC-007 built 1998)
Short-term rentals (less than 1 year) permitted - increased tenant turnover risk
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Zero claims reported across prior three policy years (2022, 2023, 2024) with Chubb, Hartford, and Liberty Mutual respectively. No cancellations.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio. Portfolio includes 9 locations totaling approximately 1,948,500 sq ft across Columbus, Brooklyn, Dayton, Cincinnati, Toledo, and Uniontown, OH. Operations include warehouse (6 locations), manufacturing (2 locations), and office (1 location). Hours of operation: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM. 95 full-time and 18 part-time employees.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place. Fire alarms are hard-wired with central station monitoring. 24-hour doorperson/security on premises. 8 of 9 locations are sprinklered (LOC-007 Toledo Manufacturing is not sprinklered). Building is not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R. No EV charging stations on premises. Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) are NOT maintained. Lockout/tagout procedures are NOT in place. Plumbing last updated 2015, HVAC 2018, Electrical 2023.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history shows zero claims for 2022 (Chubb Limited, $456,514.10 premium), 2023 (Hartford Financial Services, $419,914.35 premium), and 2024 (Liberty Mutual Insurance, $392,002.31 premium). No cancellations in any year. Premiums have been declining year-over-year.
